election_state.scenarioDescription: A coalition of environmental, labor, and heritage parties unites around shared priorities, reshaping the political landscape.

trends.label: Gig Economy Organizing
trends.description: Precarious and platform workers organize across urban and service sectors.

narrative.hook: Platform workers and service sector employees demand better protections.

trends.label: Climate Migration Crisis
trends.description: Environmental displacement and climate refugees force a national reckoning with ecological policies.

narrative.hook: Climate refugees and displaced communities turn environmental policy into a humanitarian crisis.
beats: Desert and coastal provinces feel the impact first.
Green parties frame displacement as preventable.
Establishment parties struggle with the scale.

trends.label: Heritage Preservation Fund
trends.description: A dedicated fund for preserving historical sites and cultural monuments rallies minority and traditional communities.

narrative.hook: Preservation grants turn cultural memory into political organization.

trends.label: Offshore Renewable Expansion
trends.description: Offshore wind farms and seasteads create a new coalition between environmentalists and maritime workers.

narrative.hook: Clean energy off the coast bridges environmental goals and working-class interests.

trends.label: Desert Ecology Awareness
trends.description: Desert regions highlight unique ecosystems and sustainable adaptation strategies.

narrative.hook: Desert communities frame their landscapes as fragile treasures worth protecting.
